email_text: Hello John, we have updated your account settings. No action required.
Your invoice is attached. Thank you for your business.
Reminder: your library books are due tomorrow.
The meeting agenda has been updated, please review the attachment.
Thank you for your recent purchase at our online store.
Your subscription renewal is complete and no action is required.
Friendly reminder: your delivery will arrive next week.
Your password was changed successfully. If you did not authorize this, contact support.
System notice: your backup completed successfully.
Welcome to your new account. Get started by exploring your dashboard.
Sale alert: 50% off on winter essentials. Shop now.
Your appointment is confirmed for Monday at 10:00 AM.
Thanks for attending yesterday's webinar. Here is the recording.
Your order has shipped and is estimated to arrive in 3 days.
Your flight itinerary is attached. Please confirm your seat selection.
Notice: your bank statement is now available for viewing.
Congratulations! Your access request has been approved.
We have received your support ticket and will respond shortly.
All systems are running normally. No further action is needed.
Weekly newsletter: top trends, security tips, and best practices.
Your travel itinerary has been updated with your latest reservation.
Welcome back! We missed you and your account is ready to use.
A new comment was added to your project. View it now.
Your membership has been renewed successfully.
Your service request was completed. Enjoy the updated features.
New sign-in from a recognized device. No action required.
Your password reset request is confirmed. The change was successful.
Notification: your profile has been updated.
This is a friendly reminder about your upcoming class.
All set! Your settings have been saved.
Urgent: verify your account now at http://malicious.example.com/login to avoid suspension
Alert: unauthorized sign-in detected. Click http://bit.ly/verify to secure your account.
Your bank account has been temporarily locked due to suspicious activity.
Please confirm your identity by signing in at http://secure-login.verify-account.com.
Final warning: your account will be closed if you do not act immediately.
Click here to update your payment information and avoid service interruption.
Your mailbox is almost full. Upgrade now to keep receiving messages.
Suspicious login attempt detected. Verify via http://tinyurl.com/secure-login.
We've detected a problem with your billing details. Resolve it immediately.
Your password expires today. Reset it now to prevent lockout.
Important: your order details have changed. Confirm at http://phish.example.com.
Security alert: your device is at risk. Install the update from the link below.
You have received a secure message. Access it using the link provided.
Your refund request has been denied. Please verify your information.
This is your final notice before account suspension.
Account verification required. Please sign in now to avoid closure.
Suspicious activity noticed on your email. Click to review your messages.
Your identity needs confirmation. Follow the link to complete verification.
We couldn't verify your payment. Confirm details immediately.
Your profile has been compromised. Update your credentials here.
You've won a prize! Claim it by entering your account information.
Please review the attached invoice and confirm your banking details.
Your loyalty points are invalid until you confirm your account.
This notice is from security. Verify your account by clicking the link.
Security team: your account will be removed unless you verify it now.
Your subscription has issues. Resolve them through the secure portal.
Credit card validation required. Click the link in this email.
Confirm your email address to prevent access loss.
Your login attempt failed. Re-enter credentials here.
Verify your payment method to continue service.
Action required: confirm your personal details on the secure site.
A new device signed in to your account. Confirm this activity.
